speaker: Middle-aged Man
text: Alright, it's Friday night. Movie time. What does everyone want to watch?

speaker: Small Girl
text: The one with the talking animals! I want the one with the talking animals!

speaker: Pre-teen Boy
text: That's so babyish. Can we please watch something with action? There's a new superhero movie on the streaming app.

speaker: Small Girl
text: I don't like superheroes. They're too loud and scary.

speaker: Middle-aged Man
text: Okay, okay. Let's not fight. What about an adventure movie? Something everyone can enjoy.

speaker: Pre-teen Boy
text: Adventure is fine I guess. As long as it's not a cartoon.

speaker: Middle-aged Man
text: What if we watch that new animated film about the explorer kid? It has adventure and it's animated. Win win.

speaker: Pre-teen Boy
text: Is it at least rated PG? I don't want to watch something for five-year-olds.

speaker: Middle-aged Man
text: It's rated PG. It actually got really good reviews. And I'll make popcorn.

speaker: Pre-teen Boy
text: Fine. But I get to pick next Friday.

speaker: Small Girl
text: Yay! Can I have extra butter on the popcorn, Daddy?

speaker: Middle-aged Man
text: Extra butter it is. Go grab the blankets while I set it up.
